feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Process Automation
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Process Automation Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Resource Schema Configuration in SAP Build Apps Destination to BPA Service
entry.content:
I have a BPA project that I want to use an API Unattended Trigger to execute.  I am creating a Destination to the BPA service instance and when I get to the Resource schema, the information in tutorials is a bit confusing.

What fields should be going into the schema?  Is it the values I want to pass to the BAP process or would those go down in "Additional Inputs?  Is there something else I need to add in the Resource schema?

My end goal is to have a Build Apps application execute the trigger, passing in the parameters it has gathered.

Any ideas and/or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks!

Ron

entry.title: Deployed Business Process Automation not showing in Monitoring Processes and Workflows
entry.content:
I created a new Process Automation project from scratch with only an Automation in it.  I released and deployed it to my Public environment but when I go into Build -> Monitoring -> Manage -> Processes and Workflows, it's not there.  I tested it in Editable mode and it works just fine.

I'm sure this is something silly I've done but I can't figure out what it is.

Thanks in advance for any and all help.  🙂

Ron

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation Control Tower Tiles are not loading
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In SAP Build Process Automation control tower tiles are not loading cause of this I'm unable to register any new agent to the environment, Trigger adding and etc.. I checked in various browsers and various systems as well still the issue is persist. Kindly guide us to resolve this issue. Adding screenshot for your reference.

Thanks,

Narenthiran Annamalai.

SAP Build Process Automation #Tile Loading issue #Agent register

entry.title: SAP Intelligent RPA - API trigger failed when sending the big request
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm developing an automation in SPA.

When I send a normal request to API Trigger. The Automation is working successfully.

However, when I try with a big request (big body), the automation returns the below error.

Could you help to figure out what is the problem and how to solve it?

Thank you.

entry.title: How to create attended bot in SAP Build Process Automation Cloud Studio?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Do we have any option to create attended bot in SAP Build Process Automation Cloud Studio? How to maintain the desktop agent to that?

Thanks in advance,

Narenthiran Annamalai.

SAP Build Process Automation #Attended Bot #Create

entry.title: Cannot Subscribe to SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi,

since I want to showcase SAP Build Process Automation I tried to subscribe to it on my Trial and on my company productive BTP. 

Unfortunately I am getting - for both environments - the following error message: 

Does someone know how this can be fixed? 

On my trial I tried to do it manually, on the productive at first as well and afterwards I used the booster as described here: 

https://help.sap.com/docs/build-process-automation/sap-build-process-automation/get-free-access-to-sap-build-process-automation

Both didn't work and I always get this error message.

More Info: 

on my productive I tried to subscribe to my already existing sub account - cloud foundry is hosted in us10-001. (similar to the trial sub account)

Thanks in Advance!

entry.title: User without global accounts associated in SAP BTP Cockpit - trial
entry.content:
I want configure Mail Server from SAP Build Lobby. Whenever I click on OPEN IN BTP COCKPIT, below message is displayed (see screenshot).:

Can anyone tell me how to resolve this issue. 

CUSTOM IAS TENANT is showing me this.

How do i resolve this issue ?

  SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: SAP Build apps upload files intergrate to process automation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to integrate files upload from SAP Build Apps into my process automation approval inbox. To achieve this I have followed below steps.

Step1: created a process automation creating input variable type as upload file as shown below :

Step2 :Created a project in SAP Build Apps for upload document as shown below

Step3: Map the variables at data level in SAP Build Apps

When I execute the build apps Form document is upload successfully I am getting toast message as below 

But the issue is unloaded document is not coming to inbox of my process automation, Please advice any suggestion to resolve this issue.

Thanks,

Rupesh

entry.title: SAP Build Process automation pre-delivered content
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am using SAP Build process automation pre-delivered content ( live process ) by SAP. That pre-delivered content has inbuild decision rules in them. But while we maintain the rules, each time we release the version to get new data uploaded and we ended up running out of version. I am sure i did something really wrong i assume to get into this position. My question is:

  1. How to come out of this situation and we maintain the values again?
  2. How to maintain Business rules in SAP pre-delivered content so that we never ran into this issue

Can anyone please help me in this on what's the best way of managing decision rules inside live process. Surely, there should be some other way rather than running out of versions as one might require to maintain Business Rules several times.

Thanks

Tirthankar

entry.title: SAP Security/Basis Related BPA Use-Case Scenarios
entry.content:
Does Build Process Automation has any pre-built content/process available to use for SAP security/basis activities related scenarios? or is there a list of use cases where we can leverage BPA for our security team?

I checked https://hub.sap.com/ but couldn't find any such.

I would greatly appreciate it if you could share any potential use case scenarios

entry.title: SAP Build process automation live content - maintaining decisions
entry.content:
Hello Experts.

We are using SAP Process automation live content in our project. That content brings in a Workflow , UI based applications and decision rules. However, we are facing issues when it comes to maintainence of decision rules:

Whenever we are making modification to decision rules, We have to release the version and once the version reaches for eg : 3.0.X, It does not allow us to release the version further.

Questions that i do have here:

  • Is releasing the version is the correct way of using decision rules for maintaining values of decision for these pre-activated live processes?
  • What can be done if we release a stage as maximum version has reached. I assume decision can be changed N number of times and there should not be a control to stop making new changes.

Can any one tell me if you had faced similar issues and work around way of handling it.

Thanks

Tirthankar

entry.title: Can I use DOX Custom Schemas (w/ AI functionality) with the DOX SDK in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi,

Can I use DOX Custom Schemas (w/ AI functionality) with the DOX SDK in SAP Build Process Automation?

I know that premium version is needed. 

If yes, how can I enhance the DOX SDK.

 

Thanks !

Tillbtp

entry.title: Error implementing sftp access in sap build process automation
entry.content:
Hello experts, we are trying to automate a file sending via SFTP, we enter all the credentials and through filezilla if it makes the connection, but due to the automation an error appears. Also in filezilla is working. I attach the configurations

the error is the following:

thanks for your help,

regards.
Santiago

entry.title: SAP Build IRPA not recognize screen on virtual machine
entry.content:
Hello, 

we have a virtual machine where we have out unattended agent. I have created an automation on my personal computer and it is working fine there. Unfortunately the desktop agent at the virtual machine is not recognizing the second screen of the automation. When I loaded traces, it looks like that the agent is not even aware of that the screen is loaded (see screenshots, there is no information about screen loaded but when I start it on my PC, the screen is loaded). I can see that the screen is loaded at the virtual machine, but the agent did not cach it. Do you have any ideas why is this happening?

entry.title: How to read the status of the Job of an automation created through scheduled trigger via API in SBPA
entry.content:
Hi ,

We want to read the status of the Jobs for an automation which are triggered through scheduled trigger.

Is there any API to read the status of the jobs and its details.

Thanks in Advance,

Natasha

entry.title: How to refresh an application screen using SAP iRPA - Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi

I am currently automating TCode VK11 to create Pricing Conditions using SAP iRPA. This TCode involves multiple screens. If there is a system exception in any of the screeen, I want to refresh the entire screen and start over. I can not seem to find an activity which can do this? 

I tried using refresh screen, but it asks for a screen target. However the issue is, I don't know on which screen the error may happen. Is there a better way to handle this? 

Thanks

Sandip

entry.title: No connection possible from action in automation to S/4HANA system on-premise
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I got a problem with the connection from an automation building block (artifact) in SAP Build Process Automation (SBPA) to an S/4HANA on-premise system. What I am trying to do is simply post some data in an action within the automation.

Here is what I configured so far:

Destination: 

  • Proxy Type: Internet
  • Basic Authentication
  • Host: Internal Host Name of Cloud Connector

(As recommended by this Note https://me.sap.com/notes/3251797)

I added the destination to SBPA. Then I created an Action Project with the SAP standard API from my S/4 system. When I try to pull some data with a GET request, it always appears the following message :"Maximum response size has been exceeded. Apply parameters (like $top) to reduce the query response size"

When I try to run the automation with the action in debugging mode the execution runs into an error with no error message, just a 403 code.

Did anyone experience a similar behaviour and is will to help?

Also the following posts did not help...

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/call-s4-on-premise-api-from-build-process-automation/qaq-p/12747191

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/ipra-call-a-webservice-via-destination-with-proxy-type-onpremise/qaq-p/12622753

Kind regards,

Markus

entry.title: Problem with data types of DOX Payment Advice Data Type in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to process a payment advice automatically by using SAP BPA and Document Information Extraction with the Extract Data (Pre-trained Model) for Payment Advices.

I always get an error log mentioning a discrepancy in data types. From what I understand, DOX's is giving the item 'netAmount' as a number as output but the netAmount.value in DOX SDK is actually formatted as a string.

Attached some screenshot for better understanding.

Output of automation job:

Error Log:

 

I think the discrepancy is already coming from the data types before.

Best wishes and kind regards

Till

entry.title: SAP Process Automation
entry.content: Is it possible to change the definition id of a process automation project once its deployed. I had renamed the project but its definition id hasn't changed. How to reflect this change?

entry.title: KSB1 Ready to Use Template in SAP Business Process Automation Issue
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to use KSB1 display template from SAP Business Automation store. i was able to proceed initial steps however ended up with below error ( in step Screen Switch ).

i am not sure how to rectify , since the screen switch step or the baove one is not working i guess.

any pointers will be helpful.

@Chaitanya_Priya : any insight to debug what is missing ? i am using ready to use template from the store .
